hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|])\s*git\s+commit(\s|$)'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && (npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -60) && echo '[pre-commit hook] lint passed' || { echo '[pre-commit hook] npm run lint failed — commit blocked. Fix lint errors or ask the user to bypass.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi
